commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A focused automated repair can restore the read-only auth-store behavior while preserving the terminal fallback work; maintainer API acceptance remains a separate review step.; Needs attention: The diff touches credential discovery and currently lets a read-only auth discovery path call writable auth-store code.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve read-only auth discovery when skipping overlays — src/agents/agent-... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in terminal fallback metadata for tools, propagates it through agent-core/session/runtime handling, declares cron and web_fetch fallbacks, adjusts model/auth discovery and plugin registry access, and updates docs, Docker, CI scripts, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path for the PR-introduced auth regression: call resolveAgentCredentialsForDiscovery with readOnly: true and skipExternalAuthProfiles: true and the branch no longer passes readOnly to the auth-store loader. The original channel fallback bug is supported by the PR body's live Discord after-fix proof, but I did not rerun a before/after live repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can restore the read-only auth-store behavior while preserving the terminal fallback work; maintainer API acceptance remains a separate review step.
